## What this adds

## Type

- [ ] Tutorial / notebook
- [ ] Demo / project (runnable)
- [ ] Integration
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs / other

## Location

<!-- Folder this lives in, e.g. `bm25-go-hybrid/` -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Content lives **in this repo** — not just a link to an external repo
- [ ] Runnable: dependencies declared (`requirements.txt`, `go.mod`, etc.) and run steps in the README
- [ ] README includes **expected output** so readers see what success looks like
- [ ] If it adds a table row in the main `README.md`, the label **matches the folder name**
- [ ] Tested end-to-end locally
- [ ] No secrets / API keys committed (use env vars)

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything to flag: stand-ins, follow-ups, things you're unsure about. -->
